status_ja: ±15%を超える偏りは現時点でありません(判定継続中)
status_en: No segment deviates beyond ±15% ROI so far (evaluation continues)
comment_ja: 昨日は30勝19敗、損益+6.11ユニットで終了。ランライン予想が複数試合で外れる一方、勝敗予想の的中が全体を支えた。注目点はSpain vs Argentinaの90分勝敗でオッズ2.38の的中（+1.38u）と、Colorado vs CincinnatiのO/U 11.5オーバー的中（+1.00u）。累計ROIは-2.3%で依然マイナス圏。
comment_en: Yesterday's record was 30 wins and 19 losses, yielding +6.11 units. Multiple run-line picks missed, while moneyline predictions carried the overall result. Notable hits include Spain vs Argentina 90-min winner at odds 2.38 (+1.38u) and the O/U 11.5 Over in Colorado vs Cincinnati (+1.00u). Cumulative ROI remains in negative territory at -2.3%.
